content: Hey, I just moved to Phoenix, AZ and I'm looking for some new recipes to try. Do you have any recommendations?
Congratulations on the move! What type of cuisine are you in the mood for?
I'm really into trying new things, but I'm also a big fan of Mexican food. I've been experimenting with different types of tacos.
Tacos are always a great choice! Have you tried making your own tortillas from scratch?
Not yet, but I've been meaning to. I've been busy with work as a UX researcher and haven't had a lot of time to experiment in the kitchen.
That sounds like a challenging job. Do you work remotely or do you have an office in Phoenix?
I work remotely, which is great because I can stay home with my dog, Luna, and take breaks to play tennis when I need to clear my head.
That sounds like a great setup. Tennis is a great way to stay active. Do you have a favorite tennis court in Phoenix?
Yeah, I really like the courts at the Phoenix Tennis Center. And after a long match, I love to unwind with a good cup of coffee that I brew myself.
Coffee is the perfect way to unwind. What's your favorite type of coffee to brew?
I'm really into pour-overs right now. I love the process of carefully crafting each cup.
Pour-overs are a great way to appreciate the nuances of coffee. Have you tried any new coffee beans lately?
Actually, I just got a new bag of Ethiopian Yirgacheffe that I'm really enjoying. I'm thinking of hosting a coffee and origami night with some friends next weekend.
That sounds like a fun and unique event. I'm sure your friends will appreciate the attention to detail you put into your coffee and origami.
